title: Cytotechnologist
description: Gilead Sciences seeks a Cytotechnologist to analyze cellular specimens and support diagnostic decision-making.
responsibilities: Examine and analyze cytology specimens under microscope
Identify abnormal cells and prepare reports
Maintain accurate specimen tracking and documentation
Support quality assurance and continuous improvement
Maintain laboratory standards and safety protocols

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; relevant degree or certification strongly preferred

benefits: Flexible time off and work arrangements
